aliases: How to configure ESLint 9 with Prettier using flat config
ESLint flat config TypeScript Prettier best practices

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: ESLint 9.0 (April 2024) — flat config became default, .eslintrc deprecated

constraints: ESLint 9+ requires flat config (eslint.config.js/mjs/cjs) — .eslintrc.* files are deprecated and ignored by default
eslint-config-prettier MUST be the last item in the config array to correctly disable conflicting formatting rules
Never use eslint-plugin-prettier and manual formatting rules simultaneously — they will conflict
typescript-eslint v8+ is required for ESLint 9 flat config compatibility — v7 does not work
Prettier must run as a separate step (or via eslint-plugin-prettier) — ESLint alone does not format code

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Using Biome instead of ESLint + Prettier

inputs_needed.question: Are you using TypeScript or JavaScript?
Is your project using ESM or CommonJS?
